name: openless
description: Hold a key, speak, release — AI-polished text appears at your cursor in any app. Open-source voice input for macOS & Windows. (按住快捷键说话，松开即得润色后的文字)
summaryZh: Hold a key, speak, release — AI-polished text appears at your cursor in any app. Open-source voice input for macOS & Windows. (按住快捷键说话，松开即得润色后的文字) 这是偏语音和音频方向的项目，适合做语音助手和实时交互场景。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合在持续跟踪 AI 开源趋势时作为重点观察对象。
